task: Complete phase 3.11: implement post-tool-use hook to extract and persist handover deltas (new/modified content) from Write/Edit operations
discussion_summary: Session focused on wiring the handover persistence pipeline: created post_tool_use.py hook to intercept Write/Edit operations and extract delta content, implemented writer.py to serialize handover state to JSON, reader.py to deserialize it, and updated checkpoint.py to integrate the new flow. All four core files were edited and imports verified clean. Roadmap marked 3.11 complete and committed.

accomplishments.what: Created askr/hooks/post_tool_use.py with delta extraction logic for Write/Edit operations
Implemented askr/state/writer.py to serialize handover state to JSON with proper type handling
Implemented askr/state/reader.py to deserialize handover state from JSON
Updated askr/session/checkpoint.py to integrate writer/reader and handle both dict and str goal formats
Verified all imports and syntax with Python import test

in_progress.what: Delta extraction hook — completed and committed
Handover JSON serialization — completed and committed
Handover JSON deserialization — completed and committed
Integration of writer/reader into checkpoint creation — completed and committed

next_actions.action: Review the tabular analysis of handover system gaps that was listed as an open goal — determine if it was completed this session or if it remains pending
next_actions.why: OPEN GOALS section lists 'Complete tabular analysis of handover system gaps with evidence from examined fi' but transcript does not show this work; need to clarify completion status

next_actions.action: Run full integration test: trigger a Write operation, verify post_tool_use hook fires, check that handover.json is created with correct delta content
next_actions.why: Phase 3.11 is marked complete but no end-to-end test was run; need to validate the entire pipeline works before moving to 3.12

next_actions.action: Commit any remaining uncommitted files (askr_state/implementation_state.md, askr_state/notifications.log, stress-tests/) or explicitly exclude them from version control
next_actions.why: Git status shows uncommitted changes; need clean state before starting phase 3.12

next_actions.action: Begin phase 3.12: implement handover validation and schema enforcement per roadmap
next_actions.why: Phase 3.11 is complete; next phase is ready to start

decisions.decision: Chose to handle both dict and str goal formats in checkpoint.py rather than enforcing a single type
decisions.reason: Provides backward compatibility with existing checkpoints while supporting new JSON-serialized format

decisions.decision: Implemented delta extraction at the hook level (post_tool_use.py) rather than in checkpoint.py
decisions.reason: Separates concerns: hooks capture raw deltas, checkpoint orchestrates persistence

relational_files.why: Defines phase 3.11 scope and success criteria; updated to mark phase complete
